headline: Noble Acquires Ten-Hotel Upscale Select-Service and Upscale Extended-Stay Portfolio
summary: Noble Investment Group ("Noble") today announced the acquisition of a ten-property portfolio of upscale select-service and upscale extended-stay hotels. The transaction reflects Noble's continued thematic deployment of institutional capital into travel and hospitality segments characterized by constrained supply, diversified demand drivers, and durable margin profiles — structural attributes that Noble projects to generate consistent, risk-adjusted income across market cycles.

headline: Driftwood Hospitality Management appoints new CEO
summary: The hotel management company tapped former Playa Hotels & Resorts COO Gregory Maliassas to lead its next phase of growth as it eyes expansion across the Americas.
